cases.prompt: 우리 앱 AARRR 분석해서 그로스 전략 세워줘. 퍼널 설계가 필요해.

assertions.text: Covers all five AARRR stages: Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Referral, Revenue, with tactics per stage.
Produces an experiment backlog prioritized by ICE score (Impact x Confidence x Ease).
Writes a GROWTH-PLAN.md with current state vs target per stage and a KPI dashboard design.

cases.prompt: Use the pirate metrics framework to improve our retention and design a viral referral loop.

assertions.text: Gives Retention benchmarks like D1/D7/D30 healthy levels and habit-loop tactics.
Addresses Referral with K-factor (viral coefficient) and double-sided referral rewards.
Includes a weekly growth meeting agenda template in the output.
